text: The EU AI Act has been in force since February 2025. Your report includes your individual risk-class analysis.
Only 18% of German SMEs use AI productively (Bitkom 2025). Your report shows where you stand in comparison.
Through BAFA programmes, solo self-employed professionals can receive up to €4,000 in funding for AI consulting. You will find the details in your report.
78% of German companies see GDPR compliance as the biggest hurdle for AI adoption. Your vendor audit checks this for you.
Companies that use AI in a structured way save an average of 20% of their working time on administrative tasks.
The fastest way to start with AI: automate email drafts and meeting minutes. Your report includes copy-paste prompts for this.
Successful AI adoption starts with a single workflow — not with ten tools at once.
Your report includes a 30-day challenge that guides you step by step towards productive AI use.
From February 2025, companies must demonstrate AI competence (Art. 4). Your report shows your current status.
Your report includes an AI vendor audit: a data protection and compliance check of all the AI tools you use.
Your report calculates your individual ROI — including a 3-scenario analysis with conservative caps.
ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity have different strengths. Your report recommends the best tools for your use case.
In addition to this report, you will automatically receive your AI Potential Analysis — a strategic deep dive by separate email.
This platform does not permanently store customer data and uses no tracking. GDPR-compliant by design.
Your report includes a tailored starter kit with recommended tools, setup times and funding programmes.
